name: Solectron Corporation
description: Solectron Corporation was a prominent American electronics manufacturing services (EMS) company that provided comprehensive design, manufacturing, and supply chain solutions for original equipment manufacturers (OEMs). Founded in 1977 and headquartered in Milpitas, California, the company served major high-tech industries, including telecommunications, computing, networking, and consumer electronics. Known for its global reach and manufacturing expertise, Solectron played a critical role in the electronics supply chain for decades. In 2007, the company was acquired by Flextronics International, marking the end of its tenure as an independent entity in the global electronics manufacturing market.
